[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010100110 4
1 110111010 6
2 000001011 3
3 011001101 5
4 101111001 6
5 111100111 7
6 101011011 6
7 100111111 7
